column1: # goal: Build engaging social community — local cache, polls, group chats, infinite scroll

column7: description
9 files: feed, discover, notifications, profiles, challenges, comments, feed_card, connection_button, models+providers
local-first feed cache: SocialCacheService (SharedPreferences JSON), FeedNotifier loads from cache → renders instantly → background sync without double-refresh, toJson() on FeedEvent+ReactionSummary
Poll models+provider: Poll, PollOption, PollAccess enums, pollsProvider, myPollsProvider, createPoll, votePoll, inviteToPoll
Poll UI: PollCard with animated vote bars (AnimationController 600ms), percentage display, invite-only badge
CreatePollSheet: question+options form, access control segmented button, duration picker, validation
Group chat models+provider: GroupChat, ChatMessage, GroupMember, GroupChatAccess/Role enums, ChatNotifier with 5s polling, optimistic send
GroupChatsScreen: group list, chat room with reverse ListView, message bubbles, input bar, create group sheet
API constants: poll + group chat endpoints in constants.dart, infinite scroll cursor support in FeedNotifier.loadMore()
Wire polls+groups into social hub: 4 tabs (Feed/Polls/Groups/Discover), _PollsTab, _GroupsTab, _CreateGroupInline
Infinite scroll in Feed tab: ScrollController + loadMore trigger at 300px, loading spinner indicator, converted _FeedTab to StatefulWidget
GoRouter routes for groups: /social/groups + /social/groups/:id, migrated all Navigator.push to context.push()
PollsNotifier: optimistic voting (instant UI, server sync, auto-revert on fail), PollOption.copyWith, StateNotifier pattern for polls tab
PollCard enhancements: creator avatar+name header, time-remaining display (Xd/Xh/Xm left), "Voted" badge in footer
Chat room: members list bottom sheet with role badges (Owner/Admin), message timestamps (HH:MM), replaced TODO
Chat date separators (Today/Yesterday/date), avatar collapse for consecutive same-sender messages
Leave group: confirmation dialog, popup menu with invite (admin-only) + leave actions in chat room appbar
Join button for non-member public groups in Groups tab, disabled tap for non-members
Poll share button: share question+options text via share_plus
Group description in list tiles, improved chat empty state with icon + subtitle
Local-first poll caching: SharedPreferences → instant render → background sync, same pattern as feed
GroupsNotifier with local-first cache, migrated all group screens to StateNotifier. All 3 tabs now cache-first
Report/block: ReportReason enum, BlockedUser model, 3-step report sheet (options→reason→details), block confirmation dialog, hide post, wired to feed card "..." menu
Poll search & filter: search bar filters by question/creator, FilterChips for All/Active/Ended/Voted, empty state messages adapt to search context
Group search & filter: search bar filters by name/description, FilterChips for All/Joined/Public, converted to StatefulWidget
Typing indicator: bouncing 3-dot animation, setTyping() API method, TypingUser model, StreamProvider with 3s polling, wired into chat room above input bar
Pinned messages: pin/unpin toggle (optimistic), pinned banner with sender+text+count, admin long-press menu (pin+copy), pin icon on messages, tinted bubble background
Trending stats: 3-card summary in Discover tab (active polls+votes, my groups, feed post count), _TrendCard widget with icon+value+subtitle
Chat message reactions: MessageReaction model, 6 quick emoji picker in long-press menu, optimistic reactToMessage, reaction pills below bubbles with user-reacted highlight
Community guidelines: 7 illustrated rules (kind, accurate, privacy, no hate, no diet shame, no spam, report), header card, violation warning, shield icon in social hub bar
Read receipts: ReadReceipt model, double-check mark icon, "Read by N" in long-press menu with names, markAsRead() on chat enter
Blocked users screen: list with avatars+blocked-ago, unblock confirmation dialog, empty state, error retry
@Mentions: autocomplete overlay from members list, insert on tap, highlighted mentions in message bubbles with RegExp
Mute group notifications: toggle in popup menu, muted icon in group list, snackbar confirmation
Edit group: admin edit name/description bottom sheet, mute toggle refinement, muted indicator
Poll comments: PollComment model, discussion thread bottom sheet, comment count in poll footer, API endpoint + provider
Image sharing in chat: photo picker (gallery), image preview strip, image display in bubbles with CachedNetworkImage, fullscreen viewer with InteractiveViewer, multipart upload
Profile badges: Badge model (4 tiers), BadgeCatalog (12 defs), BadgeShowcaseRow/BadgeCard/BadgeGrid widgets, badges provider, enriched profile badge grid with tap-to-detail dialog
Group notification preferences: GroupNotifPref enum (all/mentions_only/muted), picker bottom sheet in chat room popup menu, setGroupNotifPref API call
Enhanced notifications: day grouping (Today/Yesterday/weekday), filter chips (All/Unread/Social/Polls/Groups), swipe-to-mark-read Dismissible, 7 new notification types
User search in Discover: search bar with API query, search results with avatar/level/name, tap to profile, People filter chip

Direct messages: DmConversation+DmMessage models, inbox screen with unread counts, chat room with bubbles+timestamps+read receipts, DmChatNotifier with 4s polling, Message button on connected profiles
